changelog:
v1.2.1 (2026-05-22)

[Update] Rebuild Lumiere Render Studio with the latest local fixes.
[Update] Publish as a new version so installed v1.2.0 clients can receive the automatic update banner.
[Render] Keep the v1.2 render source workflow: external footage mode, manual image cutout overlay, random stock-footage speed, and long render chunking.
